title: The Ghost Breaker
writer: Jack Cunningham, Walter DeLeon, Paul Dickey
actors: Wallace Reid, Lila Lee, Walter Hiers
plot: A young man and his manservant, escaping from a backwoods family feud, are persuaded by a beautiful young heiress to help her rid her newly-gained Spanish castle of ghosts. The ghostly sightings, however, are the handiwork of the ...
